allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\LG\\Desktop\\AX 코드 학습\\챗봇 만들기" -Recurse | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName, Length)

PowerShell($body = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('{"question":"연차 신청 방법 알려줘"}'\); $req = [System.Net.WebRequest]::Create\("http://localhost:3000/api/chat"\); $req.Method = "POST"; $req.ContentType = "application/json; charset=utf-8"; $req.ContentLength = $body.Length; $stream = $req.GetRequestStream\(\); $stream.Write\($body, 0, $body.Length\); $stream.Close\(\); $resp = $req.GetResponse\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\), [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\))
